name: Cajun French Fries
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut potatoes into french fry cuts.
2. Toss with olive oil and cajun seasoning.
3. Place on cookie sheets and bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
4. Remove from oven and cool.
5. Place in freezer bags and freeze.
To cook:
1. Remove from freezer bag and place on a cookie sheet.
2. Place in an oven preheated to 350°F for 30 minutes or until golden.
